notes: Illustrative concept-stage values for areal-density bookkeeping only.
This branch extends the clean passive baseline by adding the boron/nitrogen-aware cleanup layer.
Do not present these values as validated dose-performance results.
Zones represent localized design intent, not a finalized CAD model.

zones.name: Shadow Vault sidewall
zones.description: High-occupancy refuge sidewall around crew sleep and shelter volume with added secondary-conscious cleanup treatment.

layers.name: Outer survivability shell
layers.notes: Host-vehicle structural and environmental boundary placeholder.

layers.name: Water-equivalent chamber annulus
layers.notes: Aligned with NASA technical-brief storm-shelter logic for additional water-equivalent mass around the refuge volume.

layers.name: PE/UHMWPE structural shield layer
layers.notes: Low-Z structural shielding placeholder for chronic and acute protection support.

layers.name: Boron/nitrogen-aware cleanup layer
layers.notes: Secondary-conscious inner transition layer retained as a bounded enhancement branch.

zones.name: Shadow Vault endcap
zones.description: Local endcap where end-on exposure and closure geometry require extra attention.

layers.name: Water-equivalent endcap chamber
layers.notes: Additional local hydrogen-rich mass for end-on directions.

layers.name: PE hatch-path backing layer
layers.notes: Low-Z support layer near closure geometry.

zones.name: General vehicle habitable envelope
zones.description: Lower-protection support envelope outside the Shadow Vault.

layers.name: Distributed hydrogen-rich mass
layers.notes: General vehicle distributed protection outside the refuge zone.
